subject: fix: remove dead code and add missing error handling
body:
Remove unused txn() helper from designStorage.js (never called, leftover
from initial IDB wrapper draft). Add error handling to handleDelete in
SaveLoadModal so users see feedback when deletion fails.

Tags: cleanup, ux, storage
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: indexeddb-migration
Semver: patch

title: remove dead code and add missing error handling
